---
title: "counts_2"
output: html_document
date: "2025-07-01"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Loading data

#### locusta

```{r}
counts<-read.table(file="/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/locusta_counts.txt", row.names = 1, sep="\t", header = TRUE)
counts <- counts[, 6:ncol(counts)] #deleting the first few columns
colnames(counts) <- gsub("\\.bam", "", colnames(counts))  #editing IDs
colnames(counts) <- gsub("locusta_mapped\\.", "", colnames(counts))
head(counts)
dim(counts)

metadata <- read.csv(file="/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/locusta_metadata.csv", row.names = 1, header = TRUE, sep = ";") 
head(metadata)
dim(metadata)

locusta_metadata <- metadata[colnames(counts), , drop=FALSE]
all(colnames(counts) %in% rownames(locusta_metadata))
locusta_metadata$Species <- "locusta"

locusta_counts<-counts[rowSums(counts)!=0,] #deleting zeroes
dim(locusta_counts) #182 173 -> 124 642


saveRDS(locusta_counts, file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/locusta_counts.rds")
saveRDS(locusta_metadata, file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/locusta_metadata.rds")
```

#### harmonia

```{r}
counts<-read.table(file="/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/harmonia_counts.txt", row.names = 1, sep="\t", header = TRUE)
counts <- counts[, 6:ncol(counts)] #deleting the first few columns
colnames(counts) <- gsub("\\.bam", "", colnames(counts))  #editing IDs
colnames(counts) <- gsub("harmonia_mapped\\.", "", colnames(counts))
head(counts)
dim(counts)

metadata <- read.csv(file="/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/harmonia_metadata.csv", row.names = 1, header = TRUE, sep = ";") 
head(metadata)
dim(metadata)

harmonia_metadata <- metadata[colnames(counts), , drop=FALSE]
all(colnames(counts) %in% rownames(harmonia_metadata))
harmonia_metadata$Species <- "harmonia"

harmonia_counts<-counts[rowSums(counts)!=0,] #deleting zeroes
dim(harmonia_counts)
#25 685 -> 17 497


saveRDS(harmonia_counts, file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/harmonia_counts.rds")
saveRDS(harmonia_metadata, file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/harmonia_metadata.rds")
```

#### plutella

```{r}
counts<-read.table(file="/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plutella_counts.txt", row.names = 1, sep="\t", header = TRUE)
counts <- counts[, 6:ncol(counts)] #deleting the first few columns
colnames(counts) <- gsub("\\.bam", "", colnames(counts))  #editing IDs
colnames(counts) <- gsub("plutella_mapped\\.", "", colnames(counts))
head(counts)
dim(counts)

metadata <- read.csv(file="/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plutella_metadata.csv", row.names = 1, header = TRUE, sep = ";") 
head(metadata)
dim(metadata)

plutella_metadata <- metadata[colnames(counts), , drop=FALSE]
all(colnames(counts) %in% rownames(plutella_metadata))
plutella_metadata$Species <- "plutella"

plutella_counts<-counts[rowSums(counts)!=0,] #deleting zeroes
dim(plutella_counts)
#29185 -> 28752

saveRDS(plutella_counts, file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/plutella_counts.rds")
saveRDS(plutella_metadata, file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/plutella_metadata.rds")
```

#### drosophila

```{r}

counts<-read.table(file="/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/drosophila_counts.txt", row.names = 1, sep="\t", header = TRUE)
counts <- counts[, 6:ncol(counts)] #deleting the first few columns
colnames(counts) <- gsub("\\.bam", "", colnames(counts))  #editing IDs
colnames(counts) <- gsub("drosophila_mapped\\.", "", colnames(counts))
head(counts)
dim(counts)

metadata <- read.csv(file="/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/drosophila_metadata.csv", row.names = 1, header = TRUE, sep = ";") 
head(metadata)
dim(metadata)

drosophila_metadata <- metadata[colnames(counts), , drop=FALSE]
all(colnames(counts) %in% rownames(drosophila_metadata))
drosophila_metadata$Species <- "drosophila"

drosophila_counts<-counts[rowSums(counts)!=0,] #deleting zeroes
dim(drosophila_counts)
# 13955 -> 13955

saveRDS(drosophila_counts, file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/drosophila_counts.rds")
saveRDS(drosophila_metadata, file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/drosophila_metadata.rds")
```

#### blattella

```{r}
counts<-read.table(file="/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/blattella_counts.txt", row.names = 1, sep="\t", header = TRUE)
counts <- counts[, 6:ncol(counts)] #deleting the first few columns
colnames(counts) <- gsub("\\.bam", "", colnames(counts))  #editing IDs
colnames(counts) <- gsub("blattella_mapped\\.", "", colnames(counts))
head(counts)
dim(counts)

blattella_metadata <- read.csv(file="/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/blattella_metadata.csv", row.names = 1, header = TRUE, sep = ";") 
head(blattella_metadata)
dim(blattella_metadata)

blattella_metadata <- blattella_metadata[colnames(counts), , drop=FALSE]
all(colnames(counts) %in% rownames(blattella_metadata))
blattella_metadata$Species <- "blattella"

blattella_counts<-counts[rowSums(counts)!=0,] #deleting zeroes
dim(blattella_counts)
# 28106 -> 22523

saveRDS(blattella_counts, file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/blattella_counts.rds")
saveRDS(blattella_metadata, file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/blattella_metadata.rds")
```

#### drosophila2

```{r}
counts<-read.table(file="/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/2drosophila_counts.txt", row.names = 1, sep="\t", header = TRUE)
counts <- counts[, 6:ncol(counts)] #deleting the first few columns
colnames(counts) <- gsub("\\.bam", "", colnames(counts))  #editing IDs
colnames(counts) <- gsub("X2drosophila_mapped\\.", "", colnames(counts))
head(counts)
dim(counts)

metadata <- read.csv(file="/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/2drosophila_metadata.csv", row.names = 1, header = TRUE, sep = ";") 
head(metadata)
dim(metadata)

drosophila2_metadata <- metadata[colnames(counts), , drop=FALSE]
all(colnames(counts) %in% rownames(drosophila2_metadata))
drosophila2_metadata$Species <- "drosophila2"

drosophila2_counts<-counts[rowSums(counts)!=0,] #deleting zeroes
dim(drosophila2_counts)
#13955 -> 13899

saveRDS(drosophila2_counts, file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/drosophila2_counts.rds")
saveRDS(drosophila2_metadata, file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/drosophila2_metadata.rds")
```

#### triatoma

```{r}
counts<-read.table(file="/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/triatoma_counts.txt", row.names = 1, sep="\t", header = TRUE)
counts <- counts[, 6:ncol(counts)] #deleting the first few columns
colnames(counts) <- gsub("\\.bam", "", colnames(counts))  #editing IDs
colnames(counts) <- gsub("triatoma_mapped\\.", "", colnames(counts))
head(counts)
dim(counts)

triatoma_metadata <- read.csv(file="/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/triatoma_metadata.csv", row.names = 1, header = TRUE, sep = ",") 
head(triatoma_metadata)
dim(triatoma_metadata)

triatoma_metadata <- triatoma_metadata[colnames(counts), , drop=FALSE]
all(colnames(counts) %in% rownames(triatoma_metadata))
triatoma_metadata$Species <- "triatoma"

triatoma_counts<-counts[rowSums(counts)!=0,] #deleting zeroes
dim(triatoma_counts)
# 28106 -> 22523

saveRDS(triatoma_counts, file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/triatoma_counts.rds")
saveRDS(triatoma_metadata, file = "/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/triatoma_metadata.rds")
```
